name: feats
description: Keep track of your bicycle rides and planned routes.
author: robvans <robvans@gmail.com>

scripts.electron: npm run build:electron && npm run rebuild:electron-native && electron electron/main.ts
scripts.electron:dev: npm run dev & npm run electron
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:mac:local: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --arch x64
scripts.dist:mac:universal: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --arch universal
scripts.dist:mac:signed: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:win:unsigned: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false && electron-builder --win -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:linux:appimage: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.dist:linux:appimage:x64: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && ELECTRON_BUILDER_ARCH=x64 electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.dist:linux:deb: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && electron-builder --linux deb
scripts.dist:linux:deb:x64: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && ELECTRON_BUILDER_ARCH=x64 electron-builder --linux deb
scripts.dist:linux:rpm: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && electron-builder --linux rpm
scripts.dist:linux:rpm:x64: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron-native && ELECTRON_BUILDER_ARCH=x64 electron-builder --linux rpm
